notes: Solid Tetris implementation with SRS wall kicks, DAS/ARR, hold, ghost piece, and lock delay — minor issue with lockTimer double-counting (incremented in both the gravity block and separately) but overall plays well.
An exceptionally well-crafted Tetris clone with full SRS kicks, Infinity lock delay, DAS/ARR tuning, and a 7-bag randomizer; only minor flaw is frame-rate dependent soft drop.
Solid basic Tetris with hold, ghost, queue, scoring, and SRS-like rotation, but lock-delay timing is flawed/double-counted and only one next piece is shown despite a deeper queue.
